items.desc_zh: 房利美马塞莫拉被指控未能履行对其角色进行适当监督的职责。

items.title_en: The Onion launches new effort to turn Infowars into parody website
items.title_zh: 《洋葱报》推出新举措，将 Infowars 转变为恶搞网站
items.desc_en: The new proposal would involve the publication licensing Alex Jones's company, which faces liquidation.
items.desc_zh: 新提案将涉及亚历克斯琼斯公司的出版许可，该公司面临清算。

items.title_en: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.title_zh: 日本放宽武器出口规则，打破二战后和平主义
items.desc_en: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
items.desc_zh: 这为日本向十多个国家出售武器扫清了道路。

items.title_en: Apple incoming CEO John Ternus faces a defining challenge: Fixing the company's AI strategy
items.title_zh: 苹果即将上任的首席执行官 John Ternus 面临着一个决定性的挑战：修正公司的人工智能战略
items.desc_en: Tim Cook had a highly successful tenure as Apple's CEO, but he leaves his successor with a big gap to fill when it comes to the company's position in AI.
items.desc_zh: 蒂姆·库克作为苹果首席执行官的任期非常成功，但在公司在人工智能领域的地位方面，他留给继任者一个巨大的空白需要填补。

items.title_en: Canadian killed in shooting at Mexico's ancient Teotihuacán pyramids
items.title_zh: 加拿大人在墨西哥古特奥蒂瓦坎金字塔枪击事件中丧生
items.desc_en: Several people were also injured in the incident on Monday at the popular tourist site, say Mexican officials.
items.desc_zh: 墨西哥官员称，周一在这个热门旅游景点发生的事件中，还有多人受伤。

items.title_en: The 'dumb machine' promising a clean energy breakthrough
items.title_zh: “哑巴机器”有望实现清洁能源突破
items.desc_en: A stellarator is difficult to build, but could it be the best way to make fusion energy work?
items.desc_zh: 仿星器很难建造，但它是否是使聚变能发挥作用的最佳方式？

items.title_en: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook
items.title_zh: 苹果任命新首席执行官接替蒂姆·库克
items.desc_en: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.title_en: Blue Origin rocket grounded after satellite 'mishap'
items.title_zh: 蓝色起源火箭因卫星“事故”而停飞
items.desc_en: The firm founded by Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos is investigating the failed launch.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊亿万富翁杰夫·贝索斯创立的公司正在调查此次失败的发射。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 因失踪少女死亡被控谋杀
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于女孩失踪和死亡的特殊情况，他可能面临终身监禁。

items.desc_en: Japan's meteorological agency warns another, stronger earthquake may hit in the next week,
items.desc_zh: 日本气象厅警告称，下周可能会发生另一场更强的地震，

items.title_en: Elon Musk summoned by French prosecutors amid ongoing X probe

items.desc_zh: 这位科技亿万富翁是否会参加巴黎检察官要求的面谈还有待观察。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI

items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。
